description_long: This is a modern, two-seater sofa with a sleek, minimalist design and a muted blue-gray upholstery. The sofa features a pair of wide, plush seat cushions and matching back cushions, all of which appear to be firmly attached and uniformly sized. The armrests are gently flared outward, providing a contemporary silhouette, and are set at a height just above the seat cushions. The sofa stands on four light-colored wooden legs, each positioned at the corners and slightly angled outward for stability and style. The upholstery is smooth and solid in color, with no visible patterns or decorative stitching, giving it a clean and understated look. This piece would fit well in urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or outdoor covered spaces.
description: A sleek, blue-gray modern sofa with flared armrests, smooth upholstery, and light wooden legs. It features two wide, attached seat and back cushions for a clean, contemporary look.
description_view_0: Front view showing two wide seat and back cushions, flared armrests, and the full width of the sofa.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the outward flare of the armrest and the angled wooden leg at the corner.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the sofa's overall width, with both back legs visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the armrest profile and leg placement.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two wide, attached seat cushions and two matching attached back cushions, all uniform in size and flush with the sofa frame.
attribute_armrest_style: Present, gently flared outward, medium height relative to the seat, straight profile with smooth padding and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four legs, one at each corner, made of light-colored wood, angled outward in a simple, exposed style with a slightly tapered profile.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, continuous backrest with a straight top edge and attached back cushions, no tufting or segmentation.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid color, smooth fabric with no visible pattern, texture, or decorative stitching.
